description: Triggering and output-quality prompts for brainstorming a research idea and scoping what a new paper should cover.

cases.prompt: I have a rough idea about using contrastive learning for time-series anomaly detection. Help me figure out what the paper should actually be about.
expects: produces a Paper Scoping Brief with in-scope vs deferred

cases.prompt: I think I have two contributions here. Is this one paper or two?
expects: gives a verdict + which is first if split

cases.prompt: What should I include in this paper and what should I leave out?
I have an idea but I don't really know how to frame it for a paper.
expects: asks for required context first if the seed/field/motivation is thin
does NOT invent a direction from nothing

cases.prompt: I've decided on my method. Help me vet whether it's actually novel and worth pursuing.
My contribution is fixed. Help me structure the sections and the argument of the paper.
